title: Development Phase 5 -- Lease-Up / Stabilization Downstream Data
description: Shape of the dataForDownstream object for the lease-up and stabilization phase. Covers occupancy, NOI, and stabilization status.

stabilizationDate.description: Date economic stabilization was achieved or projected.

stabilizedNOI.description: Actual or projected stabilized annual NOI.

revisedYieldOnCost.description: Revised YOC based on actual TDC and stabilized NOI.

actualVelocity.description: Average net leases per month during lease-up.

maturityCushionMonths.description: Months between projected stabilization and construction loan maturity.
